subcodes.first_line: O leaves of the Tree of God's love! His honor Amín - upon him be the Glory of God - praise be to God that he hath been connected to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات شجره محبت الله جناب امین علیه بهاء الله حمد خدا را که منتسب بنفسی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God
